title: About Ford: Our Values, History & Awards | Ford UK
text:
Ford.co.uk uses cookies and similar technologies on this website to improve your online experience and to show tailored advertising to you.

Accept Cookies Decline Cookies

You can manage cookies at any time on the manage cookie settings page but this may limit or prevent use of certain features on the website.

Please see the website privacy and cookie policy for further information.

## **LEADING THE CHANGE**

### **FORD IN BRITAIN**

# ABOUT FORD

For more than a century we’ve been leading the change in the automotive industry. Now, as we move into an electrified future, our goal is to help build a better world, where everyone is free to move and pursue their dreams.

## ALL ELECTRIC

We are introducing a new range of electric vehicles in Europe and investing billions in the future of European based manufacturing to shift our entire line-up of passenger and commercial vehicles in Europe to 100% electric by 2035.

Explore Electric & Hybrid

## CARBON EFFICIENCY

In our core Europe manufacturing operations , we have an accelerated strategy with the goal of being carbon neutral no later than 2035. <sup>Tooltip</sup>

Explore Sustainability

## 100% HUMAN

We aim to create the world's best driving and ownership experiences. We strive to create a culture of belonging for our employees and be a force for good in our communities.

Explore Careers

## OUR STORY

We’ve been thinking about the future since 1903. Find our more about Ford's history and what we've got planned for the future below.

### OUR FOUNDER

Henry Ford’s vision to make owning a car both practical and affordable changed the way we live.

Meet Henry Ford

### OUR HERITAGE

From Model T to Mustang Mach-E, discover the innovations that give the blue oval its iconic status.

Explore Our Heritage

### OUR FUTURE

All electric and beautiful to drive. Find out how we are building a better world.

Discover Our Future

next

prev

## MORE SUSTAINABLE & RESPONSIBLE

We are working to reduce emissions from our vehicles, operating world-class facilities and helping our suppliers reduce their impact.

Learn More

## SLAVERY AND HUMAN TRAFFICKING STATEMENT

If you want to receive a copy of a Ford Global Modern Slavery Statement from the past 3 years, please email your request to **FMODERNS@ford.com** .

Read the 2024 Statement (PDF 1.7MB)

## GENDER PAY REPORT

Diversity and inclusion are fundamental parts of our business strategy and are key to enabling our business to connect and grow in a way that supports our employees, suppliers and customers. We recognise the benefits of a gender balanced workforce, within our organisation and our industry, and we value the new Gender Pay Gap reporting elements in focussing our on-going efforts to achieve this aim.

View Reports

## DEALER AGREEMENT APPLICATIONS

If you set high standards of customer service, have plenty of commitment and enthusiasm, and want to see a high potential return for your investment, why not talk to us about becoming a Ford Dealer?

You’d be working with the UK’s market-leader, with access to the largest UK vehicle parc in the United Kingdom and substantial after sales opportunities. Plus, you would be joining one of the largest and longest established networks in the industry.

Read more

## SHAREHOLDERS

Ford Motor Company is a publicly traded company, which means that its common stock is available for direct purchase and sale.

Visit the [Ford Investor Relations](http://shareholder.ford.com/?releaseId=1244753633537) section of our global company site to view financial information, or if you are a Ford shareholder or thinking of becoming one.

The site features a wealth of investment information and resources, including [how to buy Ford shares](http://shareholder.ford.com/?releaseId=1244753633537) and [company reports](https://shareholder.ford.com/investors/financials-and-filings/default.aspx) .

Ask Ford

### Important Information

Imagery and information shown throughout this website may not reflect latest UK specifications, colours may vary, options and/or accessories may be featured at additional cost and locations and vehicles used may be outside of the UK.

Ford policy is one of continuous product development. The right is reserved to change specifications, colours of the models and items illustrated and described on this website at any time.

⁰ The identified dealer fitted accessories are carefully selected third party supplier branded accessories and may have different warranty conditions, the details of which can be obtained from your Ford Dealer.

Dealer fitted accessories are fitted after registration and could have an impact on your vehicle’s fuel consumption. The Combined Fuel Consumption and Combined CO <sub>2</sub> Emissions (WLTP) figures do not include dealer fitted accessories.
